onlySevenPassengersAllowed: Only seven (7) adult and child passengers are allowed in each booking.
roomCannotExceedAdult: Number of room(s) can't be more than number of adult guest(s)
flightPriceVaryNotice: Flight prices may vary depending on the travel date, fare class, and seat availability. Please review the information carefully before booking.
popupSubtitle: Applies to first order placed on the Hanuvivu Web.
flightTerm1: Valid for Hanuvivu new user only.
flightTerm2: Flight: 5% discount with a minimum transaction of 1,000,000 VND. Minimum transaction does not include any add-ons (baggage, seats, meals, and insurance).
flightTerm3: Coupon can only be used once and only valid for 1 product.
flightTerm4: Coupon can only be used on Hanuvivu Web.
flightTerm5: This promo cannot be combined with another promo.
flightTerm6: Reservations made with discount coupon are not eligible to earn Hanuvivu Points.
flightTerm7: Discount coupon is not valid for Flight + Hotel package reservations.
flightTerm8: Valid for all payment methods except Pay upon Check-in.
flightTerm9: Refund is calculated according to the total paid amount after the discount, not the initial price.
flightTerm11: Hanuvivu reserves the right to change the terms and conditions without prior notice.
carTerm1: 10% discount for Cars & Trains bookings, up to 200,000 VND with a minimum transaction of 900,000 VND.
carTerm3: Not applicable for some selected products (as determined by Hanuvivu).
carTerm4: Discount code is for new users only and cannot be combined with other discount codes.
carTerm5: The promo code for new users can only be used for their first booking made via Hanuvivu Web.
carTerm6: Discount code applies to Cars & Trains bookings made on Hanuvivu Web.
carTerm7: Limited number of discount codes. The program may end earlier than expected without prior notice.
carTerm9: Each customer (corresponding to 1 phone number, 1 email, 1 credit card account, 1 device) is allowed to use the code only once during the promotion period.
carTerm11: Discount code cannot be exchanged for cash.
carTerm12: Customers who use the discount code for the wrong purpose or violate the terms & conditions of the promotion will be refused use of Hanuvivu's discount code in the future.
carTerm13: Wrong use of the discount code is when Hanuvivu determines that the discount code is applied for the wrong purpose, for fraud or profit.
carTerm14: Hanuvivu is not responsible for reissuing discount codes that are interrupted, canceled due to fraud, technical errors or incorrect use.
carTerm15: Hanuvivu has the right to change the terms and conditions of the program without prior notice.
hotelTerm1: 8% hotel discount up to 300,000 VND with a minimum transaction of 1,000,000 VND.
hotelTerm4: The promo code for new users can only be used for their first booking made via Hanuvivu Web.
hotelTerm5: Discount code applies to hotel bookings made on Hanuvivu Web.
hotelTerm6: This promotion cannot be combined with other promotions.
hotelTerm7: Applies to hotels and room types depending on the policy of each hotel.
hotelTerm8: Limited number of discount codes. The program may end earlier than expected without prior notice.
hotelTerm9: The promotion does not apply to Pay at Hotel.
hotelTerm10: Each customer (corresponding to 1 phone number, 1 email, 1 credit card account, 1 device) is allowed to use the code only once during the promotion period.
hotelTerm11: Only applicable when paying in VND.
hotelTerm12: The discount code cannot be exchanged for cash, or products and cannot be transferred to others.
hotelTerm13: Customers who use the discount code for the wrong purpose or violate the terms & conditions of the promotion will be refused use of Hanuvivu's discount code in the future.
hotelTerm14: Wrong use of the discount code is when Hanuvivu determines that the discount code is applied for the wrong purpose, for fraud or profit.
hotelTerm15: Hanuvivu is not responsible for reissuing discount codes that are interrupted, canceled due to fraud, technical errors or incorrect use.
hotelTerm16: Hanuvivu has the right to change the terms and conditions of the program without prior notice.
tourTerm1: Valid for Hanuvivu new user only.
tourTerm2: Tours discount 10% up to 1,000,000 VND with a minimum transaction of 5,000,000 VND.
tourTerm3: Coupon can only be used once and only valid for 1 product.
tourTerm4: Coupon can only be used on Hanuvivu Web.
tourTerm5: This promo cannot be combined with another promo.
tourTerm6: Reservations made with discount coupon are not eligible to earn Hanuvivu Points.
tourTerm7: Discount coupon is not valid for Flight + Hotel package (or other combo packages).
tourTerm8: Valid for all payment methods except Pay upon Check-in.
tourTerm10: Hanuvivu reserves the right to change the terms and conditions without prior notice.
